description: You are an optical engineer designing a Keplerian Telescope system. Using the specifications in '~/Desktop/telescope_specs.txt' and the starter diagram '~/Diagrams/telescope_schematic.drawio', create a precise ray tracing diagram to scale (1 grid unit = 10 mm). The diagram must include an Objective convex lens at the 0 mark, an Eyepiece convex lens at the distance determined by the sum of focal lengths ($f_o + f_e$), and a marked Focal Point where the intermediate image forms. Draw three representative light rays (Top, Center, Bottom) traveling left-to-right that enter parallel to the axis, converge at the Focal Point, and exit the Eyepiece parallel. Include dimension lines for focal lengths ($f_o$ and $f_e$) and label the 'Objective', 'Eyepiece', and 'Focal Point'. Export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/telescope_ray_diagram.pdf'.
